description:
Fix and polish the Workflow/Kanban board with these 4 changes:

## 1. Fix Loading Skeleton (5 Columns)
**File:** `src/app/workflow/workflow-client.tsx`
- Update the KanbanBoard dynamic import's loading fallback from 4 skeleton columns to 5
- The board has 5 columns: todo, in_progress, pending_approval, done, cancelled
- Make skeleton widths match actual column widths

## 2. Inline Quick-Create Task
**File:** `src/app/workflow/workflow-client.tsx`
- Add a "+" button at the bottom of the "Todo" column
- Clicking reveals an inline text input (not a modal)
- Type title + Enter → creates task via API with default values (todo status, no assignee, medium priority)
- On success: task appears in Todo column (optimistic update preferred)
- Advanced fields still accessible via "Add details" link → opens existing TaskForm modal

## 3. Clear All Filters Button
**File:** `src/app/workflow/workflow-client.tsx`
- When any filter chip is active, show a "Clear all" link/chip at the end of the filter chips row
- Clicking resets: search text, assignee filter, event filter, venue filter, priority sort, group-by setting
- Smooth transition as filters clear

## 4. Mobile Horizontal Scroll with Snap
**File:** `src/app/workflow/workflow-board.tsx` (or appropriate board component)
- On screens < 1024px:
  - Board container: overflow-x-auto with scroll-snap-type: x mandatory
  - Each column: scroll-snap-align: start, min-width: 85vw
  - Column headers remain sticky top
  - Drag-and-drop disabled on mobile (touch DnD unreliable)
  - Instead of DnD: show a "Move" button on each card that opens a column selector
- On screens >= 1024px: current DnD behavior unchanged

### Tests per change:
- 5-column skeleton renders correctly
- Quick-create input appears and submits
- Clear all resets all filters
- Mobile scroll snap works on narrow viewport
- Touch DnD disabled, Move button present on mobile

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
